sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ فَارُوقٌ مَنْزِلًا بِلَا طَعَامٍ فِي الثَّلَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Faruq je pronašao dom bez hrane u frižideru.
sentences.translationEn: Faruq found a home with no food in the fridge.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَطْبُخَ مَعَ مَا تَبَقَّى مِنْ مَطْبَخِهِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je kuhati s onim što je ostalo u kuhinji.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to cook with what remained in his kitchen.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ بَيْضًا وَخُبْزًا وَزَيْتًا وَطَبَخَ إِفْطَارًا بَسِيطًا.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je jaja, hljeb i ulje i skuhao jednostavan doručak.
sentences.translationEn: He found eggs, bread, and oil and cooked a simple breakfast.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ بِرِضًا وَقَرَّرَ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ الطَّعَامَ غَدًا.
sentences.translation: Jeo je zadovoljno i odlučio kupiti hranu sutra.
sentences.translationEn: He ate with contentment and decided to buy food tomorrow.
